task_completion.description: Navigate to the Holidays configuration page in TimeTrex.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TimeTrex web interface with the 'Holidays', 'Company Holidays', or 'Policy' administration page open.
A record or list entry in TimeTrex showing the name 'Memorial Day' associated with the date '2026-05-25' (or equivalent format like 05/25/2026 or May 25, 2026).
A record or list entry in TimeTrex showing the name 'Independence Day' associated with the date '2026-07-03' (or equivalent format like 07/03/2026 or July 3, 2026).
A record or list entry in TimeTrex showing the name 'Labor Day' associated with the date '2026-09-07' (or equivalent format like 09/07/2026 or September 7, 2026).
A record or list entry in TimeTrex showing the name 'Thanksgiving Day' associated with the date '2026-11-26' (or equivalent format like 11/26/2026 or November 26, 2026).

integrity.description: The agent used the TimeTrex GUI to configure the holidays.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TimeTrex web interface being used to enter the data, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The holiday records are visible within the actual TimeTrex application interface, not in a text editor like Notepad or Gedit.

integrity.description: The holiday records appear as genuine entries in the TimeTrex system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The holidays are displayed in the standard TimeTrex data table or form layout, consistent with the application's UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected holidays and their exact dates for 2026 are: Memorial Day (2026-05-25), Independence Day (2026-07-03), Labor Day (2026-09-07), and Thanksgiving Day (2026-11-26).
